name: ducklake
description: Connect to a DuckLake catalog as your OLAP engine

attach.title: Attach clause
attach.description: DuckDB ATTACH clause that points at your DuckLake catalog. Include the metadata backend and DATA_PATH.
attach.x-hint: Supported metadata backends: DuckDB file, SQLite, Postgres, MySQL. Data path can be local or object storage (s3://, gs://, azure://).

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Set to 'readwrite' to allow Rill to create and modify tables. Defaults to 'read' (read-only).

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: duckdb
[[ renderProps .props ]]
